allow: Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('visits_all \(3\).xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, { header: 1 }\); console.log\('Headers:', JSON.stringify\(data[0]\)\); console.log\('Row 1:', JSON.stringify\(data[1]\)\); console.log\('Row 2:', JSON.stringify\(data[2]\)\); console.log\('Total rows:', data.length\);")
